description: spoonacular provides a food, nutrition, and recipe data platform with APIs for recipes, ingredients, grocery products, menu items, meal planning, and related food analysis. It is used to build food, cooking, and nutrition applications.
summary: spoonacular exposes one authenticated REST API at https://api.spoonacular.com for recipe, nutrition, ingredient, product, meal-planning, wine, and food-related operations; no public GraphQL API, MCP server endpoint, or CLI was confirmed.
